<!--
PR TITLE must be a Conventional Commit — it becomes the squash commit on main
and feeds release-please / CHANGELOG.

  <type>(optional-scope): <lowercase subject>

types: feat | fix | docs | style | refactor | perf | test | build | ci | chore | revert
Use `feat!:` or a `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer for breaking changes.

Branch name must be <type>/<description>, e.g. feat/add-flag, ci/bump-x.
-->
